name: Umami
description: Simple, fast, privacy-focused alternative to Google Analytics
compose:
name: slashnode-umami
services:
  app:
    image: ghcr.io/umami-software/umami:3.1.0
    container_name: app
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    user: '1001:1001'
    depends_on:
      - db
    environment:
      DATABASE_URL: postgresql://umami:umami@umami_db_1:5432/umami
      DATABASE_TYPE: postgresql
      APP_SECRET: ${secret.APP_SEED}
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:25727:25727
  db:
    image: postgres:15-alpine
    container_name: db
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: umami
      POSTGRES_USER: umami
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: umami
    volumes:
      - db_data-db:/var/lib/postgresql/data
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  db_data-db:
    name: slashnode-umami_db_data-db
notes: Auto-converted from getumbrel/umbrel-apps (umami). Review before shipping. Upstream: https://umami.is. Default login — user: "admin", password: "umami". ⚠️ SECURITY: ships a default password ("umami") — must be changed on first login.
